blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,359 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 58°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 10".
